answer.text:
Dear Simon,

Since these bookings are from 21/22, the vessel is already closed. Please request the Marine team to temporarily activate it, then proceed with the AR re-interface.


Kind regards,

 

Kieran Ji / 季胤喆

System Engineer

Digital & IT Department

Mobile: +86-17701880547 <tel:+14707390496> 

E-mail: kieranji@culines.com <mail

Web: www.culines.com <http://www.culines.com/> 



 


Date: Friday, March 20, 2026 at 17:28

Cc: Rita Qu/CUL-CN/FIN <ritaqu@culines.com>, Monica Teng/CUL-CN/FIN <monicateng@culines.com>, #CUL FIN Agency <agencyfinance@culines.com>, #CUL Allegro Support <allegrosupport@culines.com>, #CUL Revenue Audit <revenueaudi
